title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; run and chat with local LLMs from Node or browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface); manage models & conversations in the browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; interact with local LLMs from JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, generate, and pull models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps Ollama REST API with ergonomic commands and fzf integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s chat sidebar.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and model management.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama CPU & GPU (CUDA, ROCm) usage with one-liner run commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package for Ollama JavaScript client with 50k+ weekly downloads.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package for Ollama Python client with 100k+ monthly downloads.

title: ollama-rf
summary: Robot Framework library that adds keywords to interact with Ollama models in test automation.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but actively maintained Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama’s API.
